data.content: Shipment review failed: f3eb code not on main. Commits 9e4dcc5a and 959e5bb9 on branch foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback were never merged to origin/main. Branch needs rebase on current main (53f9867f) first — main advanced 3 commits since the branch fork. Action required: rebase foolery-f3eb-loading-feedback on main, then push to origin/main, then re-enter shipment_review.
